Notes: Prerequisite ensures host4.campus.edu. exists with an A RRset but no TXT RRset. The UPDATE requests delete_rrset for the absent TXT type, which RFC 2136 does not clearly classify when the owner name is in use.

Steps.Description: Assert host4.campus.edu. exists, then delete the absent TXT RRset at that owner name.

Steps.Name: host4.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Verify whether the existing A RRset survived the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host4.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the absent TXT RRset remains absent after the UPDATE.
